description: This file is an HTML document that serves as the front-end interface for a database visualizer. It includes UI layout, styles, and embedded JavaScript for fetching and displaying database information, tables, and data dynamically.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and updates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resets current selections, and updates the UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads tables for a selected database and displays them in the sidebar.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches data for a selected table and renders it in the main content area.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML to display table data in a scrollable, styled table.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Returns HTML for a table cell, handling various data types and truncations.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Toggles expansion of cell content for detailed view.
